titleStmt.title: SII 42.31: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 31. (A.R. No. B. 38 of 1953-54.) Cheñchu-Eṟṟaguḍi, Dhone Taluk, Kurnool District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab in the compound of the Rāmaliṅgēśvara temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1486, Raktākshi, Kārtika, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1564, October 19.

Registers the grant of a village situated in Kōṭikōṇa (?) - sīma by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Koṇḍrājayyadēva-mahārāja, son of Timmarāja and grandson of Koṇḍreḍḍi of Gobbūru to god Rāmēśvara of Yeṟṟaguḍi for the merit of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Timmarājayyadēva-mahārāja from whom the donor is said to have obtained the territory as uṁbaḷi. The donor is stated to have belonged to the Kāśyapa-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākhā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of an animal, liṅga, moon and sun.

śubhamastu
namastuṁga sirascuṁbi (śiraścuṁbi)caṁdrachā(cā)maracāravē .
trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
sa(sva)sti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1486 Agunēṭi rakta(ktā)kṣi saṁvatsara kārtika śu
15 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāsi(śi)varāyadēva mahārāyalu
gāru vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvī
sāṁbrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍha(ḍa)gānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra Āpastaṁbha(ba) sūtra yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina kāśyapa gōtra
pavitṛ(tru)laina gobbūri koṁḍreḍigāri pautṛ(tru)laina timmarājugāri
putṛ(tru)laina koṁḍrājayadēva mahārājulu gāru yaṟaguḍi
rāmēśvaradēvuniki yiccina grāmadānadharma śāsanakramameṭla
ṁnnanu . śrīman mahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju tiṁmarājiya(jayya)
dēva mahārājulugāru māku pāliṁci(ca)nicci
na kōṭikōṇasīmalōni yaṟaguḍi grāmaṁlōniki cellē
ṭi catussīmalōgala nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgā
mi sidha(ddha)sādhyaṁbulani yeḍi Aṣṭha(ṣṭa)bhōgatējasvāmyataluṁnnu
I(Ī) tathātithi puṇyakālamaṁdu tuṁgabhadrātīramaṁdu vi
rūpākṣadēvuni saṁnnidhini sahiraṇyōdaka dāna dhārā
pūrvakaṁgānu rāmarāju tiṁmarājayadēva mahārā
julaku puṇyamavunaṭugānu yaṟaguḍi rāmēśvaradē
vara Amṛtapaḷakuṁnnu Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālakuṁnu Āca
ṁdrārkasthāyigānu trivācakaṁgānu daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁ
ci dhāravōsi yiccina śilādharma śāsanaṁ sāne(sāni) mānelu(mānulu)
pūrvamariyāda . madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpati vaṁśajā
(jō) vā yō bhūmipā(ssa)tatamuja(jva)ladharmacittaḥ . maddharma
mēma(va)satataṁ pratipālayaṁti tatpādukadvayamahaṁ si(śi)
rasāvahāmi . 1 . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ para
dattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphala
ṁ bhavētu(t) . 2 . svadattāṁ vā paradattāṁ vā yō harēti
vasuṁdharāṁ(m) . ṣaṣṭhi(ṣṭi)rvaruṣa(varṣa) sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ . 3 . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī jēyu
nu . raghunāthā nī pādālē gati
Below this inscription five lines are engraved in late characters.

tōha māḍitini gāriki ceruvuku
mīku vīḍunuṁ ci vari
pravardhamāna
bhayā paniki varimaḍi
sarvamānyaṁ
Digital edition of SII 42.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
